channel.title: Mandarin Blog
channel.description: Articles on learning Mandarin Chinese: study plans, character learning methods, listening practice, HSK preparation, and the science of language acquisition.

item.title: How to Pass HSK 3: A Study Plan That Actually Works
item.description: A 12-week HSK 3 study plan covering vocabulary, listening, reading, grammar, and tones. Data-driven prep that targets your actual weak spots.

item.title: Anki vs Dedicated Chinese Apps: Which is Better for Learning Mandarin?
item.description: An honest comparison of Anki and dedicated Chinese learning apps. When to use each, what the trade-offs are, and why many serious learners use both.

item.title: The Best Way to Learn Chinese Characters: Beyond Rote Memorization
item.description: Four proven methods for learning Chinese characters that actually stick: radical decomposition, spaced repetition, context-based learning, and the cleanup loop.

item.title: Chinese Listening Practice: How to Improve When You Can't Understand Anything
item.description: A step-by-step guide to improving Mandarin listening comprehension. Speed adjustment, listen-first workflow, and how to close the gap between reading and listening vocabulary.

item.title: What HSK Level Do You Need for Real-World Goals?
item.description: An honest breakdown of what each HSK level (1-9) actually gets you in real life: travel, work, reading, conversation, and media comprehension.

item.title: How Mandarin Was Built: Lessons in Language Acquisition
item.description: The story behind Mandarin: why the app was built from scratch, what the research says about memory and language acquisition, and every mistake made along the way.
